column2: Verify CAA Assessor Sets Defensible RSM Requirements
column3: ['The assessor has access to a UAS operational authorization application with robust safety measures. ', 'The assessor uses swarm-aware SORA evidence for review. ', 'The assessor reviews the provided swarm-aware SORA evidence. ', 'The assessor sets RSM requirements based on that reviewed evidence. ', 'The set RSM requirements are defensible. ']
column4: ['The assessor is able to open and navigate the application. ', 'The assessor selects and opens the provided swarm-aware SORA evidence in the operational authorization application. ', 'The assessor examines all relevant sections of the swarm-aware SORA evidence within the operational authorization application. ', 'The assessor enters and submits new or updated RSM requirements in the operational authorization application, using information from the reviewed swarm-aware SORA evidence. ', 'An independent reviewer confirms that the RSM requirements are reasonable, appropriate, and based on the provided swarm-aware SORA evidence. ']
